description: A legacy HR dashboard running at http://localhost:8080 is vulnerable to SQL injection. Protect the application by implementing a sidecar Web Application Firewall (WAF) using the 'owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx' image in the configuration at /home/ga/legacy-app/docker-compose.yml. The WAF must proxy traffic to the 'app' service and serve as the exclusive entry point for traffic at http://localhost:8080, ensuring the application is protected against SQL injection attacks while remaining accessible for legitimate use. Note: The 'owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx' image uses the 'BACKEND' environment variable to define the upstream service.
